pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns that might explain the shrinkage?

| Component ID | Expected Stock (WMS) | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| RES-992-X | 4,500 | 4,492 | -8 |
| CAP-102-B | 12,000 | 11,995 | -5 |
| IND-441-Z | 850 | 842 | -8 |
| CPU-009-S | 150 | 149 | -1 |
| MEM-552-K | 3,200 | 3,194 | -6 |

The variance is small but it's happening every week with these specific high-density parts. Any ideas why?
